name: WorkMagic
description: Automated incrementality testing platform combining geo-based experiments, multi-touch attribution and MMM for DTC brands.

seo.title: WorkMagic — Mobile Attribution / MMP
seo.meta_description: WorkMagic: Automated incrementality testing platform combining geo-based experiments, multi-touch attribution and MMM for DTC brands.

when_to_use: Geo-based incrementality experiments for DTC brand media
Combining MMM with multi-touch attribution for ad budgets
Measuring true campaign lift without last-click attribution

pros: Bundled geo experiments, MTA and MMM for DTC
Faster onboarding than stitching three vendors
Pricing accessible to growing DTC brands
cons: Young platform with thin public case studies
Depth of each pillar lags specialists
Not a mobile-app MMP in SKAN terms
review.verdict: Promising all-in-one measurement bundle for DTC, but buyers should still validate against specialist MMM and MTA.
review.best_for: Mid-market DTC brands wanting unified incrementality, MTA and MMM without stitching three vendors.
review.not_for: Mobile-only apps or data-science teams demanding best-in-class per measurement capability.
